Starter army generation for web-city-builder demo.
City/building math and starter city seeding for the web-city-builder prototype.
Derives a city-to-world/MUD economic bridge snapshot from city surplus, frontier pressure, civic stress, and public infrastructure drag.
Intended as an auditable export seam so later MUD/world services can consume city-side support signals without coupling directly to city-builder route internals.
v0.2 adds concrete consumer guidance for vendor supply, mission board support posture, civic services drag, and top-level operational advisories.

v0.4 adds deriveVendorSupportPolicy(summary, consumers) so vendor-facing systems can consume bridge posture as concrete stock/price/cadence recommendations instead of only reading generic guidance cards.
v0.5 adds concrete vendor economy recommendations (stock/restock/price) derived from live city↔MUD vendor policy for downstream consumers.

v0.6 adds deriveVendorRuntimeEffect(base, policy) so vendor/admin tooling can preview live runtime stock/cadence/price behavior under current bridge pressure, including fill-state-aware scarcity messaging.
v0.7 adds deriveVendorGuardrailApplication(base, runtime) so runtime previews can be staged/applied through a server-side safe one-step window instead of full-strength jumps.
v0.8 adds lane-aware vendor policy derivation so essentials, comfort goods, luxury goods, and arcane stock can respond differently to the same bridge posture.
v0.9 adds explicit lane-set selection helpers so guarded vendor applies can target audited lane groups instead of depending on whatever rows happen to be visible.

v1.0 adds audited vendor posture presets (scarcity essentials protection, luxury throttle, arcane caution, broad recovery) so guarded tooling can target reusable lane groups without re-encoding them in the UI.
v1.1 adds CityMudVendorScenarioLogEntry plus buildVendorScenarioLogNote(...) so guarded vendor runtime previews/applies can be logged with consistent audit text.

v1.2 splits bridge summary/consumer-policy derivation into web-backend/domain/cityMudBridgeSummary.ts so bridge posture math can be maintained separately from vendor runtime helpers without changing callers.
owns: Lane-aware vendor policy overlays for essentials/comfort/luxury/arcane stock.
provides: City ↔ MUD bridge summary (supportCapacity, pressures, exportableResources, hooks, posture)
Concrete consumer guidance for vendor supply / mission board / civic services
Vendor support policy (stock/price/cadence posture + recommended multipliers)
Vendor runtime effect preview (effective knobs + fill-aware scarcity state)

v0.4 is now intended to be informed by city↔MUD vendor policy previews in the admin UI, even though the endpoint still persists global vendor_item_economy settings.
v0.5 now returns per-row bridge recommendations plus current vendor policy so admin tooling can stage/apply live city-aware tuning.
v0.6 now returns per-row bridge_runtime_effect previews so admin/vendor tooling can inspect live effective runtime knobs without persisting them first.

v0.8 returns per-row bridge_lane_policy and applies guarded/runtime previews through that lane-aware policy instead of a single blunt vendor posture.

v1.0 extends POST /api/admin/vendor_economy/bridge_runtime_guarded with presetKey support so operators can preview/apply reusable guarded vendor posture presets.

v1.1 adds GET /api/admin/vendor_economy/bridge_runtime_guarded_log and writes preview/apply scenario entries with bridge posture, target selection, softened counts, and blocked rows for operator audit.
v1.2 adds GET /api/admin/vendor_economy/scenarios plus normalized replay/report rollups, filterable posture history, and richer scenario log detail (selection kind, top warnings, sample rows).
v1.3 adds GET /api/admin/vendor_economy/scenarios/export plus grouped review buckets (preset/lane/bridge/state/action) so operators can export and review posture history at a glance.
